title: Sessehshellah
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Sessehshellah |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{WEGCite|story=Rings of Bright Water|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)}} |class=[[Mustalid]] |subspecies= |races= |height=Three [[Foot/Legends|feet]] |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Shaymore]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Somehow I don't think a bunch of cute, furry, three–foot–tall mustalids armed with laser popguns is gonna give the Imperial governor any sleepless nights.''"
"''Perhaps your timid ancestors were more accustomed to slavery?''"
"''No, indeed, but my timid ancestors weren't dumb enough to attack stormtroopers with sharpened clam shells fastened to sticks…|A crewmember of the ''[[Dorion Discus]]'' and a Sessehshellah|}} The '''Sessehshellah''', or '''Sesseh''', were a race of three–[[Foot/Legends|foot]] tall [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[mustalid]]s that resembled giant river [[Otter/Legends|otters]]. They were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shaymore]]. Though skilled at combat and stealth, the Sessehshellah had very little modern technology, with their available weaponry amounting to little more than sharpened [[Clam/Legends|clam]] shells mounted on sticks. Resultantly, they were easy prey for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which stole most of the planet's [[hydrocarbon]]s. The Sessehshellah were freed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], who supplied them with modern weapons to better fight the Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] and destroyed the Empire's main [[Imperial hydrocarbon refinery|refinery]], leading the Imperials to abandon Shaymore. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Rings of Bright Water|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Expansion Region sentient species]] [[Category:Mammalian sentient species]]
